title: Korbond Fastener Pack 40pcs - 110224
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s No. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Pack contains: x 1 Screw Top 3 Tier Container, 12 x Pairs Snap Fasteners, 20 x Pairs Hook & Eyes and 4 x Pairs Hook & Bars. A complete set of fastening essentials for beginner to expert sewers
Korbond Fastener Pack provides an assortment of different types and sizes of fasteners in a handy stackable screw top container, ideal for separating the different styles of fastener
The fasteners can be used for a variety of suitable applications ranging from household projects to sewing tasks including garment construction and repairs and work on soft furnishings
